channel.title: Naija Digest Online
channel.description: Nigeria’s one-stop hub for breaking news, tech, football, celebrity gossip, Naija music, live TV, exchange rates and trending topics.

item.title: How we’ll stop governors from hijacking state police — Senate leader
item.dc:creator: Punch
item.description:
Senate Leader Opeyemi Bamidele details how state police funding will be a first-line charge in the constitution to prevent governors from hijacking state p
Read More: https://punchng.com/how-well-stop-governors-from-hijacking-state-police-senate-leader/

item.title: Shops close early after Lagos NURTW official’s killing, police deploy patrol
item.dc:creator: Punch
item.description:
Panic in Lagos as shops close early and police deploy patrols after the killing of a prominent NURTW official. Residents fear reprisal attacks.
Read More: https://punchng.com/shops-close-early-after-lagos-nurtw-officials-killing-police-deploy-patrol/

item.title: 📱Top reaction to stunning Argentina comeback
item.dc:creator: ESPN Soccer
item.description: The sports world was thrilled by Argentina's dramatic 2-1 comeback win over England to advance to the World Cup Final.

item.title: Messi, Argentina stun England late to reach final
item.dc:creator: ESPN Soccer
item.description: Argentina sealed a dramatic semifinal comeback against England at Mercedes-Benz Stadium with two goals in the final five minutes to clinch a 2-1 win and book a World Cup final clash with Spain on Sunday.

item.title: Mbappé critical of tactics in loss by 'sloppy' Fra...
item.dc:creator: ESPN Soccer
item.description: Kylian Mbappé seemed to question Didier Deschamps' approach and tactics after France's 2-0 defeat to Spain in the FIFA World Cup semifinal Tuesday.

item.title: FIFA defends 'world-class' ref after France critic...
item.dc:creator: ESPN Soccer
item.description: FIFA's director of refereeing Pierluigi Collina defended the referee in Tuesday's semifinal between France and Spain following criticism from France coach Didier Deschamps.

item.title: Post Malone headlines WCup closing ceremony
item.dc:creator: ESPN Soccer
item.description: A wide array of performers, from Post Malone to Tom Cruise to streamer IShowSpeed, will help close out the World Cup, FIFA said Tuesday.

item.title: Man United's Ugarte undergoes knee surgery
item.dc:creator: ESPN Soccer
item.description: Manuel Ugarte has undergone surgery after suffering a knee injury at the World Cup, Manchester United have confirmed.

item.title: Navas headlines Liga MX squad for MLS ASG
item.dc:creator: ESPN Soccer
item.description: Costa Rican goalkeeper Keylor Navas, a three-time World Cup participant, headlines the Liga MX squad set to face MLS stars in the All-Star Game on July 29 in Chicago.

item.title: Greenwood signs with Fenerbahçe from Marseille
item.dc:creator: ESPN Soccer
item.description: Former Manchester United forward Mason Greenwood on Wednesday signed for Fenerbahçe to join his third club in three years.

item.title: Fraud case against ex-Serie A ref chief dropped
item.dc:creator: ESPN Soccer
item.description: Milan's public prosecutor has dismissed the case against former Italian referee designator Gianluca Rocchi and his deputy Andrea Gervasoni for alleged sports fraud.

item.title: Kane: Holding on was not enough against Argentina
item.dc:creator: Sky Sports Football
item.description: England captain Harry Kane admitted trying to hold on to a 1-0 lead backfired as their World Cup hopes were ended by Argentina's late show in a 2-1 semi-final defeat.

item.title: Argentina show why they're reigning World Cup cham...
item.dc:creator: ESPN Soccer
item.description: Argentina flipped the script yet again with two late goals to stun England, sending them to the World Cup final with a chance to repeat as champions vs. Spain.

item.title: Player ratings: Messi gets 9/10 as Argentina beat ...
item.dc:creator: ESPN Soccer
item.description: Lionel Messi provided the decisive cross that helped Argentina to the World Cup final after beating England 2-1 in stoppage time.

item.description: CAC said the exercise forms part of its regulatory mandate to maintain an accurate and up-to-date register of companies operating in Nigeria. The post CAC begins sixth batch of company strike-off, targets 100,000 companies appeared first on Premium Times Nigeria.

item.title: Argentina face fine for displaying Falklands banner after semi-final
item.dc:creator: BBC Sport Football
item.description: Argentina face the prospect of a Fifa fine after their players celebrated the World Cup semi-final win against England with a banner in support of their country's claims to the Falkland Islands.

item.dc:creator: Leadership

item.dc:creator: Leadership

item.title: Kane ‘gutted’ after England crash out of World Cup
item.dc:creator: Vanguard
item.description: Harry Kane said he was "gutted" for England and their fans after his team were beaten 2-1 by defending champions Argentina in the World Cup semi-finals on Wednesday. The post Kane ‘gutted’ after England crash out of World Cup appeared first on Vanguard News.

item.description: England missed out on their first World Cup final since 1966 after a stunning late turnaround from rivals Argentina saw the holders earn a 2-1 victory thanks to Lautaro Martinez’s stoppage-time winner.

item.title: Super Falcons defender Shukurat Oladipo signs new AS Roma deal
item.dc:creator: Premium Times
item.description: The Giallorossi confirmed the agreement in an official statement, rewarding the Nigerian centre-back for an impressive debut spell in the Italian capital The post Super Falcons defender Shukurat Oladipo signs new AS Roma deal appeared first on Premium Times Nigeria.

item.title: Argentina stun England in 2-1 comeback win to reach 2026 World Cup final
item.dc:creator: Al Jazeera
item.description: Holders Argentina will face Spain in the final after snatching victory from England in ⁠a highly charged encounter.

item.title: How a routine police check exposed a suspected criminal network in Lagos
item.dc:creator: PM News
item.description: Members of the public are encouraged to remain vigilant and promptly report suspicious persons, vehicles, or activities to the nearest police

item.title: Benue court begins process towards trial of Al-Jazirah correspondent
item.dc:creator: Daily Post
item.description: A Benue State High Court sitting in Makurdi has fixed October 22 for the pre-trial conference in the case involving Al-Jazirah newspaper correspondent in Benue, Henry Ibya. Justice Shishi adjourned the matter on Wednesday after it emerged that not all documents filed by the defen

item.title: Yobe Govt Raises Alarm Over Diversion Of Ready-To-Use-Therapeutic Food
item.dc:creator: Channels TV
item.description: The state asked for a stop to the attitude. The post Yobe Govt Raises Alarm Over Diversion Of Ready-To-Use-Therapeutic Food appeared first on Channels Television.

item.title: FG, States, LGs share N2.550trn revenue for June
item.dc:creator: Tribune
item.description: The Office of the Accountant General of the Federation (OAGF) has revealed that a total sum of N2.550 trillion has been shared for The post FG, States, LGs share N2.550trn revenue for June appeared first on Tribune Online.

item.title: xAI sues a man for using Grok to generate CSAM ‘deepfakes’
item.dc:creator: The Verge
item.description: The Elon Musk-owned xAI is suing a South Carolina man who allegedly used the company's Grok AI chatbot to generate child sexual abuse material (CSAM). In a lawsuit reported earlier by Reuters, xAI claims Terry Wayne Harwood "knowingly and intentionally used Grok to circumvent safeguards, alter nonco

item.title: World Cup 2026: Messi Inspires Argentina To Dramatic 2-1 Comeback Win Against England
item.dc:creator: Completesports
item.description: Lionel Messi inspired World Cup holders Argentina to a stunning comeback to beat England 2-1 on Wednesday and set up a final with European champions Spain, France 24 reports. England had been on course to reach their first World Cup final since 1966 after Anthony Gordon fired them into the lead 10 m

item.title: GIGM strengthens national transport network with new terminal
item.dc:creator: BusinessDay
item.description: GIG Mobility (GIGM) has strengthened its national transport network with the opening of a new passenger terminal in Ekwulobia, Anambra read more GIGM strengthens national transport network with new terminal
